refined_caption: The trash bins outside the hospital are overflowing with waste. The surrounding area appears to be littered with trash.
complaint_description: I was appalled to see the trash bins outside the hospital overflowing with garbage. This is not only an eyesore, but it also poses a health risk to patients and visitors. The hospital should take immediate action to address this issue.
voice_text: The trash cans outside the hospital are totally overflowing, it's really gross. Someone should clean them out ASAP.
